reviews.comment:
es la segunda vez que venimos a este camping con una mini Rodante. Tomas de luz en parcelas. Parrillas. Seguridad. Cerca del centro. Los baños impecables duchas con agua caliente las 24 hs. Muy recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
This is the second time we've come to this campsite with our mini campervan. Electricity hookups at each site. Grills. Security. Close to the town center. The bathrooms are spotless, with hot showers available 24/7. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNGIzRDNnRRAB
